'''鈭歡-k-s-ng''' ('''kagaksengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultracentrifuge|ultracentrifuge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultracentrifuge|ultracentrifuge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-k-s-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kagaksengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigaksengoko|thigaksengoko]] || [[word:jigaksengoko|jigaksengoko]] || [[word:shigaksengoko|shigaksengoko]] || [[word:kigaksengoko|kigaksengoko]]
|-
